title: Spawn Eggs! New!
description: Updated textures for spawn eggs for every version! Works on versions other than 1.21.x and does not require optifine.
body:
![updated egg textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94369aca71fd27553f736554372ca73091267244.png)

## Clearly distinguish spawn eggs!
This resourcepack replaces the old spawn egg textures with the newly updates ones.

## This resourcepack uses proper models!
Your spawn eggs will not look weird when held!
